author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 20: 2 Tier-3 ipv6 docs (RX/TX path closes the IPv6 stack proper). net/ipv6/ip6-input.md (ipv6_rcv → bounded extension-header walker → fragment reassembly → local-vs-forward dispatch + netfilter PRE_ROUTING/LOCAL_IN/FORWARD; defense vs CVE-2017-7542 EH-explosion + RFC 5095 RH0 dropped — 13 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) + net/ipv6/ip6-output.md (ip6_xmit socket-driven egress → EH inject → MTU+frag (RFC 8200 source-only) → neigh-resolve → xmit + GSO/TSO + ident-field generator + multicast — 14 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open). 13 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~79 .design docs. ipv6 stack core complete: af-inet6 + route + addrconf + ndisc + icmpv6 + ip6-input + ip6-output. Next: net/ipv6/exthdrs.md (per-EH-type semantics) or net/ipv6/tcp-v6.md + udp-v6.md (per-IPPROTO v6 wrappers).
